# OrchidUI

> A Vue 3 UI component library with Tailwind CSS and OrchidUI design tokens (`oc-*` prefix), built for HitPay products.

## Getting Started

- [Full reference](/llms-full.txt): Inlined props, events, slots, rules, and code examples for every component.

## Usage

```js
import { Button, Modal, Input } from '@orchidui/core'
import '@orchidui/core/dist/style.css'
```

- All components are **Vue 3** Composition API
- Styling via **Tailwind CSS** with `oc-*` design tokens
- Icons: `<Icon name="check" />`
- Boolean props follow `is*` convention — e.g. `isLoading`, `isDisabled`

## @orchidui/core (131 components)

- [Table](/raw/docs/components/Table.md): Display tabular data with sorting, selection, and custom cell slots.
- [TableHeader](/raw/docs/components/TableHeader.md): Header cell for Table, supports text or checkbox variant.
- [TableCell](/raw/docs/components/TableCell.md): Body cell for Table, supports content/chip/datetime/icon/image variants.
- [TableCellContent](/raw/docs/components/TableCellContent.md): Two-line cell content with title and description.
- [TableLink](/raw/docs/components/TableLink.md): Wraps table cell content as a link.
- [ExpandingTable](/raw/docs/components/ExpandingTable.md): Table with collapsible/expandable nested rows.
- [ExpandingTableRow](/raw/docs/components/ExpandingTableRow.md): Single row inside ExpandingTable.
- [ExpandingHeaderRow](/raw/docs/components/ExpandingHeaderRow.md): Header row for ExpandingTable.
- [Pagination](/raw/docs/components/Pagination.md): Page navigation with prev/next and numbered buttons.
- [PrevNext](/raw/docs/components/PrevNext.md): Previous or next button used inside Pagination.
- [PaginationNumber](/raw/docs/components/PaginationNumber.md): Numbered page button used inside Pagination.
- [Overview](/raw/docs/components/Overview.md): Group of metric cards showing key stats with icons.
- [OverviewIcon](/raw/docs/components/OverviewIcon.md): Colored icon badge inside OverviewItem.
- [OverviewItem](/raw/docs/components/OverviewItem.md): Single metric card with title, value, and trend indicator.
- [CustomerCard](/raw/docs/components/CustomerCard.md): Display customer or beneficiary details.
- [TransferSummary](/raw/docs/components/TransferSummary.md): Show money transfer summary with amount, fee, and FX rate.
- [ListItem](/raw/docs/components/ListItem.md): Versatile list row for timeline, webhook, payment, and accordion layouts.
- [ListUrl](/raw/docs/components/ListUrl.md): Display a labelled URL with copy button.
- [ListDetail](/raw/docs/components/ListDetail.md): Label-value row in horizontal or vertical layout.
- [InfoCard](/raw/docs/components/InfoCard.md): Content card with title, loading state, and header/footer slots.
- [ProgressBar](/raw/docs/components/ProgressBar.md): Step-based linear progress bar.
- [FloatContent](/raw/docs/components/FloatContent.md): Floating side panel with title, description, and actions.
- [HorizontalProgressbar](/raw/docs/components/HorizontalProgressbar.md): Horizontal bar showing current vs max value.
- [OcOnboardingListItem](/raw/docs/components/OcOnboardingListItem.md): Onboarding checklist row with number badge and action button.
- [OcOnboardingRecap](/raw/docs/components/OcOnboardingRecap.md): Collapsible recap card for onboarding sections.
- [OcAccountVerificationContent](/raw/docs/components/OcAccountVerificationContent.md): Container for account verification steps.
- [OcAccountVerificationBox](/raw/docs/components/OcAccountVerificationBox.md): Selectable verification option card.
- [NewTable](/raw/docs/components/NewTable.md): Table with row expansion, selection, and named column slots.
- [OcRowItemData](/raw/docs/components/OcRowItemData.md): List of labelled data items with optional chip and copy button.
- [Accordion](/raw/docs/components/Accordion.md): Collapsible section with header and body.
- [OnboardingAccordion](/raw/docs/components/OnboardingAccordion.md): Accordion with onboarding status variant.
- [OnboardingProductOption](/raw/docs/components/OnboardingProductOption.md): Selectable product option card with image.
- [Tabs](/raw/docs/components/Tabs.md): Tab bar for switching between views.
- [PaymentTab](/raw/docs/components/PaymentTab.md): Tab selector for payment methods.
- [Steps](/raw/docs/components/Steps.md): Step indicator for multi-step flows.
- [Step](/raw/docs/components/Step.md): Single step inside Steps.
- [Variants](/raw/docs/components/Variants.md): Group of selectable option cards.
- [Variant](/raw/docs/components/Variant.md): Single selectable option card with icon and label.
- [SwitchTabs](/raw/docs/components/SwitchTabs.md): Segmented control for switching between a few options.
- [Header](/raw/docs/components/Header.md): Top-level application header shell.
- [SubHeader](/raw/docs/components/SubHeader.md): Secondary header below the main header.
- [HeaderLeft](/raw/docs/components/HeaderLeft.md): Left slot of the Header.
- [HeaderCenter](/raw/docs/components/HeaderCenter.md): Center slot of the Header with back button support.
- [HeaderRight](/raw/docs/components/HeaderRight.md): Right slot of the Header with action buttons.
- [TabToSelect](/raw/docs/components/TabToSelect.md): Tab bar inside Header for route switching.
- [Checklist](/raw/docs/components/Checklist.md): Checklist step item with index, label, and completion state.
- [PageTitle](/raw/docs/components/PageTitle.md): Page title bar with back button and primary/secondary actions.
- [PrimaryActions](/raw/docs/components/PrimaryActions.md): Primary action buttons or dropdown inside PageTitle.
- [PageTitleRight](/raw/docs/components/PageTitleRight.md): Right action area of PageTitle.
- [Sidebar](/raw/docs/components/Sidebar.md): Main application sidebar with expandable menus.
- [SidebarSubmenu](/raw/docs/components/SidebarSubmenu.md): Expandable submenu inside Sidebar.
- [AccountSetup](/raw/docs/components/AccountSetup.md): Account setup progress widget inside Sidebar.
- [SidebarHead](/raw/docs/components/SidebarHead.md): Header section of a Sidebar menu group.
- [SideBarMenu](/raw/docs/components/SideBarMenu.md): Single menu item in Sidebar.
- [SidebarSubMenuItem](/raw/docs/components/SidebarSubMenuItem.md): Child menu item inside SidebarSubmenu.
- [SidebarFooter](/raw/docs/components/SidebarFooter.md): Footer section of the Sidebar.
- [SidebarFeatureBanners](/raw/docs/components/SidebarFeatureBanners.md): Feature promotion banners inside Sidebar.
- [AccountSetupProgress](/raw/docs/components/AccountSetupProgress.md): Circular progress indicator for account setup in Sidebar.
- [SubSidebar](/raw/docs/components/SubSidebar.md): Secondary sidebar for sub-navigation.
- [EmptyPage](/raw/docs/components/EmptyPage.md): Placeholder shown when a section has no data.
- [AdditionalContent](/raw/docs/components/AdditionalContent.md): Side panel with customer info, overview, and action buttons.
- [InfoCardButton](/raw/docs/components/InfoCardButton.md): Selectable card button with title and content.
- [Skeleton](/raw/docs/components/Skeleton.md): Loading placeholder that mimics content shape.
- [FeatureOverviewCard](/raw/docs/components/FeatureOverviewCard.md): Card listing product features with icons.
- [SandboxBanner](/raw/docs/components/SandboxBanner.md): Top banner indicating sandbox/test mode.
- [TopBanner](/raw/docs/components/TopBanner.md): Dismissible top-of-page announcement banner.
- [Box](/raw/docs/components/Box.md): Clickable card with icon, title, and description.
- [OcSection](/raw/docs/components/OcSection.md): Content section wrapper with optional title.
- [AuthenticationOption](/raw/docs/components/AuthenticationOption.md): Selectable authentication method card.
- [VerificationOption](/raw/docs/components/VerificationOption.md): Selectable verification method card.
- [Chip](/raw/docs/components/Chip.md): Status or category badge with color and style variants.
- [Snackbar](/raw/docs/components/Snackbar.md): Toast notification with icon and action buttons.
- [Banner](/raw/docs/components/Banner.md): Inline notification banner with dismiss support.
- [ShareIcon](/raw/docs/components/ShareIcon.md): Icon button for sharing via a channel (e.g. WhatsApp).
- [Tag](/raw/docs/components/Tag.md): Small colored label for status annotation.
- [BaseInput](/raw/docs/components/BaseInput.md): Form field wrapper with label, hint, and error slot.
- [Button](/raw/docs/components/Button.md): Action button with primary/secondary/destructive variants.
- [CardInput](/raw/docs/components/CardInput.md): Credit card number input with card type detection.
- [Checkbox](/raw/docs/components/Checkbox.md): Single checkbox input.
- [CheckboxesGroup](/raw/docs/components/CheckboxesGroup.md): Group of checkboxes with select-all support.
- [Criteria](/raw/docs/components/Criteria.md): Read-only pass/fail criteria indicator.
- [Input](/raw/docs/components/Input.md): Text input with icon, prefix, and password toggle.
- [InputOption](/raw/docs/components/InputOption.md): Tag-style input for adding multiple free-text values.
- [PhoneInput](/raw/docs/components/PhoneInput.md): Phone number input with country code selector.
- [Radio](/raw/docs/components/Radio.md): Single radio button input.
- [RadioGroup](/raw/docs/components/RadioGroup.md): Group of radio buttons.
- [RangeInput](/raw/docs/components/RangeInput.md): Dual numeric input for a min/max range.
- [Select](/raw/docs/components/Select.md): Dropdown with single/multi select, filtering, and async search.
- [Option](/raw/docs/components/Option.md): Single option item inside Select.
- [GroupOptions](/raw/docs/components/GroupOptions.md): Labeled group of options inside Select.
- [Toggle](/raw/docs/components/Toggle.md): On/off toggle switch.
- [LinkInput](/raw/docs/components/LinkInput.md): Input for social or custom links with platform selector.
- [TextArea](/raw/docs/components/TextArea.md): Multi-line text input with auto-resize.
- [Calendar](/raw/docs/components/Calendar.md): Standalone date or date-range calendar picker.
- [DatePicker](/raw/docs/components/DatePicker.md): Date or range picker input with popover calendar.
- [Slider](/raw/docs/components/Slider.md): Range or single value slider.
- [SectionItem](/raw/docs/components/SectionItem.md): Settings row with title, toggle, and action slot.
- [SelectOptions](/raw/docs/components/SelectOptions.md): Visual option picker in grid or list layout.
- [SingleFileUpload](/raw/docs/components/SingleFileUpload.md): Single file upload with preview and size limit.
- [MultipleUploadFile](/raw/docs/components/MultipleUploadFile.md): Multiple file upload with preview grid.
- [NumberInput](/raw/docs/components/NumberInput.md): Numeric input with increment/decrement buttons.
- [Avatar](/raw/docs/components/Avatar.md): User or business avatar in multiple sizes.
- [Icon](/raw/docs/components/Icon.md): SVG icon by name from the OrchidUI icon set.
- [Dropdown](/raw/docs/components/Dropdown.md): Popover dropdown menu attached to a trigger.
- [DropdownItem](/raw/docs/components/DropdownItem.md): Single item row inside a Dropdown.
- [Tooltip](/raw/docs/components/Tooltip.md): Hover or click tooltip/popover.
- [Modal](/raw/docs/components/Modal.md): Dialog modal with header, body, and footer.
- [OcModalPage](/raw/docs/components/OcModalPage.md): Full-screen modal page with back button.
- [ConfirmationModal](/raw/docs/components/ConfirmationModal.md): Pre-styled confirm/delete/warning dialog.
- [Popper](/raw/docs/components/Popper.md): Low-level Popper.js positioning wrapper.
- [SupportMenu](/raw/docs/components/SupportMenu.md): Floating help/support menu with grouped links.
- [CopyTooltip](/raw/docs/components/CopyTooltip.md): Wrap any element to copy its value to clipboard.
- [WhiteList](/raw/docs/components/WhiteList.md): Feature gate card shown when plan does not include a feature.
- [Theme](/raw/docs/components/Theme.md): Wrap app to apply light/dark color mode.
- [FormBuilder](/raw/docs/components/FormBuilder.md): Dynamic form renderer from a JSON schema.
- [DataTable](/raw/docs/components/DataTable.md): Data table with filtering, pagination, search, and bulk actions.
- [FilterSearch](/raw/docs/components/FilterSearch.md): Search input inside DataTable filter toolbar.
- [FilterSearchFor](/raw/docs/components/FilterSearchFor.md): Active filter chips with remove controls.
- [FilterForm](/raw/docs/components/FilterForm.md): Filter form panel driven by JSON schema, used inside DataTable.
- [ComplexCalendar](/raw/docs/components/ComplexCalendar.md): Full calendar panel with range selection and shortcuts.
- [ComplexDatePicker](/raw/docs/components/ComplexDatePicker.md): Date range picker input with label and format options.
- [ModalCropper](/raw/docs/components/ModalCropper.md): Modal-based image cropper.
- [Cropper](/raw/docs/components/Cropper.md): Inline image cropper.
- [Draggable](/raw/docs/components/Draggable.md): Drag-and-drop wrapper for reorderable lists.
- [DraggableList](/raw/docs/components/DraggableList.md): Styled draggable list with icon and action slots.
- [EmojiPicker](/raw/docs/components/EmojiPicker.md): Emoji selector popover input.
- [ThumbnailTheme](/raw/docs/components/ThumbnailTheme.md): Theme selection card with preview and activate/publish actions.
- [ThumbnailSection](/raw/docs/components/ThumbnailSection.md): Section template card with preview and add action.
- [SubPlanCard](/raw/docs/components/SubPlanCard.md): Subscription plan tier card listing features.
- [TimePopup](/raw/docs/components/TimePopup.md): Time picker popup.
- [TimePicker](/raw/docs/components/TimePicker.md): Time picker input with popover clock.

## @orchidui/dashboard (13 components)

- [LineChart](/raw/docs/components/LineChart.md): Time-series line chart for trend visualization.
- [PieChart](/raw/docs/components/PieChart.md): Pie or donut chart for proportional data.
- [BarChart](/raw/docs/components/BarChart.md): Bar chart for comparing values across categories.
- [BarRaceChart](/raw/docs/components/BarRaceChart.md): Animated bar race chart for changing rankings.
- [Card](/raw/docs/components/Card.md): Dashboard card container with title and content.
- [OcOverviewPieChart](/raw/docs/components/OcOverviewPieChart.md): Pie chart for overview/summary widgets.
- [OverviewMonthlyBarChart](/raw/docs/components/OverviewMonthlyBarChart.md): Monthly bar chart for overview reporting.
- [ColorPicker](/raw/docs/components/ColorPicker.md): Color picker input with hex/rgb support.
- [TextEditor](/raw/docs/components/TextEditor.md): Rich text (WYSIWYG) editor.
- [ColorPickerPopup](/raw/docs/components/ColorPickerPopup.md): Popover color picker for inline color selection.
- [OnboardingProgressbar](/raw/docs/components/OnboardingProgressbar.md): Progress bar for onboarding completion.
- [CodeBlock](/raw/docs/components/CodeBlock.md): Syntax-highlighted code block.
- [LottieAnimation](/raw/docs/components/LottieAnimation.md): Renders a Lottie JSON animation.
